name: SpacetimeDB Domain Hidden In Reducer
summary: Avoid placing business invariants directly in SpacetimeDB reducers instead of explicit domain aggregates or services.

antiPatterns: A reducer contains a multi-branch business state machine that should belong to an aggregate or domain service.
A repository silently performs cross-aggregate cascades that are not visible at a coordinating reducer boundary.
Domain types derive or import SpacetimeDB traits solely to reuse storage or wire representation.

blocks.markdown: Reducers are the transactional entrypoint, not a dumping ground for domain policy. Hiding invariants in reducer glue makes host tests harder and spreads decisions across network-facing functions.

blocks.reason: Use the reducer as an adapter to explicit domain behavior.
